name: Orange Glazed Pork Roast
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds Boneless, Skinless Pork Loin Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees F.
2. Place the pork roast in a large resealable bag with flour.
3. Add instant bouillon, cinnamon, orange juice, thyme, salt, and pepper. Seal the bag tightly.
4. Shake well to coat the roast evenly.
5. Bake for 1 to 1 1/2 hours or until a meat thermometer reads 170 degrees F.
6. Remove the roast from the bag, stirring any juices into the sauce.
7. Spoon the sauce over the roast.
For a variation: Place 2 medium apples, cored and quartered, and 2 medium sweet potatoes, peeled and quartered, in the bag around the roast before sealing. Bake as directed.
